calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paula Goodwin for Anita Lee (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it will grant the petition with regard to the bank accounts, but not as to the real property. Ms. Goodwin stated that they are asking the Court to confirm the community property aspect of this for tax purposes, that there are two aspects to a petition for spousal property (title and character), and that this relates to character not title. The Court noted that the property is in joint tenancy, that the property is gone/has already transferred to the petitioner and made reference to the language in Probate Code 13650. The Court bifurcates and grants the petition with respect to the bank accounts (bifurcated order signed in open Court). The Petition for Spousal Property with respect to the real property is continued to May 30, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide further briefing/legal authority.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2018 Continued To May-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
